LanguageData.RHGun_DOOMClassic_Chaingun.description: The chaingun (also known as "gatling gun") is a rapid-firing, multi-barrelled automatic weapon that uses the same ammunition as the pistol. A high velocity heavy weapon capable of suppressing multiple targets at once.
LanguageData.RNGun_DOOMClassic_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.RNGun_DOOMClassic_Pistol.tools.1.label: muzzle
LanguageData.RHGun_DOOMClassic_Shotgun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.RHGun_DOOMClassic_Shotgun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.RHGun_DOOMClassic_Shotgun.tools.2.label: muzzle
LanguageData.RHGun_DOOMClassic_Chaingun.tools.0.label: barrel
